div.h2: Intel Manual Standard: io_uring kernel-user shared memory

ul.li: SQE (64B): Perfectly fits one L1 cache line.
CQE (16B): 4 entries per 64B line; minimizes cache misses during reaping.
Index separation: Head and Tail reside in separate cache lines to prevent False Sharing between Kernel (Consumer) and User (Producer).

p.em: Barriers ensure producer writes are visible before index updates.

div.p: [Offset: sq_off.array] +--------+--------+--------+--------+ | sqe[0] | sqe[1] | sqe[2] | ... | +--------+--------+--------+--------+ User writes tail index here to point to specific SQEs

g.text: STORE_RELEASE: Tail must not be visible before SQE data
